title: Smoke Signals
description: Allows campfire smoke to be coloured based on the block placed below. Revolutionize long-distance communication!
body:
![A wide view, showing coloured campfire smoke illuminating the night sky in different places](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pwEUrYbl/images/81d0a8090bb879f9b1a639361452f21464fb0a94.png)
# Smoke Signals
#### Get ready for some seriously smokin' communication. Transform your campfires into a symphony of colours. Say goodbye to dull chat messages and say hello to a playful way of communicating with your pals across large distances!

# ✅ Features
- **Coloured Smoke** can be created by placing any wool block under a campfire
- **Configuration** allows for any block to generate particles from a campfire
- **Client-side**, so that only you and your friends need to have the mod, not the server

# 📖 Configuration
All particles and the blocks that emit particles can be changed in ```config/smoke_signals.json```. A config screen will be available in the future.

# 📷 Visuals
![A comparison of all colored smoke particles, side by side, with their respective wool block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pwEUrYbl/images/f0e0e325377f980464f35eea8c9831491e56eb1e.png)
